title: Your Love, My Crown

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A G D Em F#)
**Generate with warm tones and minimal high-frequency emphasis.**

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Your eyes, like doves, shining bright,
Behind your veil, they steal the night.
Your hair, a flowing river wide,
Cascading down in endless tide.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Your lips drip honey, sweet and fine,
Your voice, a song of love divine.
Your neck, a tower standing tall,
Strong in grace, yet soft in call.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: You are my garden, hidden and pure,
A fountain sealed, a heart secure.
With every breath, my soul is found,
In love that knows no earthly bound.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: **You ravish my soul, you take my breath,**
**Like dawn’s first light, you conquer death.**
**Stronger than tides, deeper than seas,**
**Love unchained, forever free!**

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Your fragrance drifts, the winds take flight,
My heart is yours, both day and night.
Come, my love, let rivers flow,
Awake the dawn, let passion grow!

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Set me as a seal upon your heart,
No flame can quench what God imparts.
Love is the fire, fierce and true,
Nothing can take my love from you!

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: **You ravish my soul, you take my breath,**
**Like dawn’s first light, you conquer death.**
**Stronger than tides, deeper than seas,**
**Love unchained, forever free!**

sections.label: Outro
lines: Your love, my crown, forever mine…

epigraph: thou hast doves’ eyes within thy locks
lyricEyebrow: From the Book of Song of Songs
styleNote: Soft Piano · Electric Guitar Cries Out · Then Explosion Of Sound
